caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap with a circular logo, and large black over-ear headphones sits in front of a dark, textured acoustic foam wall. He is positioned behind a professional microphone, which is mounted on a boom arm. A black graphic overlay covers the right side of the screen, featuring the brand name "MiiR" above the words "WINE LINE" in a large, clean font. Below this, smaller text reads "750 ml Bottle" and "10 oz Tumbler." The man is speaking into the microphone, and throughout the sequence, he remains in a similar position, with his expression and posture showing minimal variation as he talks. The scene remains static in terms of camera angle and lighting, focusing on the man and the branded text overlay.
